sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I removed all 9 green blocks but the level didn't complete. Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

seg = current_frame.segmentation
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'])
print("Colors:", dict(color_counts))

# Check green blocks
green_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks: {len(green_nodes)}")

# Check S regions
s_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
print(f"S regions: {len(s_nodes)}")
for n in s_nodes:
    print(f"  S: {n['pixels']} cells, {len(n['children'])} children")

# Check player
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Player Y: {n['boundary']}")

# Check timer
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
row63 = ascii_lines[63]
print(f"Timer p count: {row63.count('p')}")

# Look at key rows
for r in [0, 10, 15, 20, 30, 35, 40, 50, 60]:
    row_str = ascii_lines[r]
    print(f"Row {r}: {row_str[10:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Row 50-60: S region on right (cols 31-52)
